title: Fresh Flesh(FF)
description: Make rotten flesh useful, balanced and automated.
body:
# Welcome to Fresh Flesh(FF)

You've built a zombie farm to gather XP, but now you're left with tons of useless rotten flesh. So, you install a mod to turn flesh into leather, but eventually, you realize you don’t need it anymore. Not wanting to waste the resource, you add a mod to convert flesh into food, but then you build a golden carrot farm, making that mod obsolete too. Next, you think, "What if I compost the flesh?" but Minecraft doesn't support that feature, and every mod you find either lacks it or comes with a bunch of unnecessary extras.

![Rack Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/607e9f254f744f28696b10c23048fb957849aba8.png)

**Autorack(1.0.4.0 + )**:

![Autorack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SoNzliJB/images/0128d980b0962882b33202817f2f62fc16e453bf.png)


Well, guess what? We've got you covered! Fresh Flesh (FF) introduces a brand-new block: the Flesh Rack. Simply place your rotten flesh on this sleek block, then right-click it with your axe—just like stripping bark. This removes all that zombie gunk and leaves you with a clean, usable piece of flesh.

To remove the freshly cleaned flesh from the rack, simply right-click it with an empty hand. Once you've collected your clean flesh, you're ready to start crafting your 
![User rack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SoNzliJB/images/210ddbb894c53e134be117219eb99f2cf22cadce.png)

To remove the freshly cleaned flesh from the rack, simply right-click it with an empty hand. Once you've collected your clean flesh, you're ready to start crafting your items!

**Jerky**
Cooked on a Campfire

![Clean Flesh to Food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SoNzliJB/images/607027e4e10e957d3690b8a411ae48d074caa7b5.png)

**Bone Meal**
Crafting Table

![Clean Flesh to Bonemeal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc370e86494e5442d27e6ee4a6d611c996514c23.png)

 - Composter, Clean Flesh 30% chance to add a stage.
 - Composter, Rotten Fless 15% chance to add a stage.

**Leather**
Crafting Table

![Clean Flesh to Bonemeal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae1bcac97c0e03d3c92dd992893cfc292bfd620a.png)


As a little bonus I also included 2 paintings a 1 block and 4 block versions
![ingame paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08ef972cd4a964cf51080c55195ed0d5960cab44.png))
### **Features of the Fresh Flesh Mod (FF)**

**-Flesh Rack Block**
A new block where you can hang and clean your rotten flesh. Perfect for converting zombie drops into usable resources.

**-Rotten Flesh Cleaning Mechanic**

 - Place rotten flesh on the Flesh Rack.
 - Right-click with an axe (similar to stripping bark) to remove the zombie gunk, leaving you with clean flesh.

**-Easy Item Retrieval**

 - Right-click the Flesh Rack with an empty hand to remove the cleaned flesh.
 - Right-click the Flesh Rack with you axe to also remove your clean flesh(1.0.3.0).
 - If you need that Rotten Flesh back you can also just Right-click it with a empty hand and it will return the Rotten Flesh(1.0.3.0).

**-Crafting with Clean Flesh**
Once you've collected the clean flesh, you can use it to craft various useful items:

 - Rotten Flesh to Leather
 - Rotten Flesh to Bone Meal
 - Rotten Flesh to Jerky (Food)

**-Autorack(1.0.4.0 + )**
 - _Image below is a 1.21.1 example_
![1.21.1 Example for the Autorack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a9a68a57bc50b44e087d84a863a88e8a926f36e_0.webp)

**Using Autorack**:

 - Right click on the Autorack to open it's gui add your rotten flech and in 2 seconds you will have your clean flesh
 - hoppers and chests to do this on a large scale, you can also do as the image above where you can create a farm linked to the autorack and then a crafter meaning you can make lether, bonemeal or food.
